chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-2297 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on CMA No.18923/2025. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.1 to 6. 3. For orders on CMA No.11043/2025. 4. For orders on CMA No.11044/2025. 5. For hearing of main case. 23.09.2025. Mr. Ashfaque Qureshi, Advocate for the Petitioner. ----- 1. Granted. 2-5. After making certain preliminary submissions, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petition is not being pressed any further as the Petitioner would avail his remedy before the Civil Court of competent jurisdiction in accordance with law. Under such circumstances, the instant Petition stands dismissed accordingly alongwith other pending Miscellaneous Applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
